sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n9206" key="a)noma/lwsis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀνομάλ-ωσις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n9206.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">restoration of equality, equalization,</tr_> ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0086.tlg035.perseus-grc1:1274b:9" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1274b9</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
